title: pilosella guthnikiana
intro: Pilosella guthnikiana, also known as Jacobaea guthnikiana, is a plant species within the sunflower family. It is a rare, perennial plant native to the Caucasus region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Pilosella guthnikiana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its health benefits include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and providing antioxidant properties.
